plugins.name: sop-rca-plugin
plugins.description: Root cause analysis for SOP monitoring pipeline failures. Analyzes end-to-end evaluation logs, DDM temporal segmentation, VLM action recognition, training data, and fine-tuning configs to identify failure patterns and produce actionable improvement recommendations.

plugins.name: sop-cr-finetuning-plugin
plugins.description: Fine-tune Cosmos-Reason2 (CR2) VLM for SOP monitoring with config preparation and real-time training monitoring

plugins.name: sop-ddm-finetuning-plugin
plugins.description: Fine-tune DDM-Net temporal boundary detector for SOP monitoring with pre-flight validation and real-time training monitoring

plugins.name: sop-data-augmentation-plugin
plugins.description: Configure, trigger, monitor, and troubleshoot the SOP data and QA augmentation pipeline. Transforms annotated video data into 7 types of structured QA formats (BCQ, MCQ, GQA, DMCQ, DSQA, ENQA) for VLM training.

plugins.name: sop-evaluation-plugin
plugins.description: Run SOP evaluation pipelines via the BP evaluation-ms HTTP API: end-to-end inference (temporal segmentation + action recognition + accuracy) and by-action VLM evaluation (per-action-clip inference + accuracy metrics).

plugins.name: sop-ft-orchestrate-plugin
plugins.description: Autonomous orchestrator for the full SOP fine-tuning pipeline: from annotated dataset to production-ready DDM + VLM models. Runs the complete Import → Augment → DDM Train → VLM Train → Evaluate → RCA loop, interprets RCA results, applies fixes, and iterates until success criteria are met.
